# Charged Studio

> Charged Studio is a founder-led web design and digital studio based in Exeter, Devon, UK. We build fast, modern websites, custom software, local SEO and branding for growing service businesses across Devon and the South West. Tagline: "Built to perform. Charged to last."

## What we do
- [Websites](https://chargedstudio.co.uk/services/websites): Custom, fast, mobile-first, fully-managed websites built to rank locally and turn visitors into enquiries.
- [Software & Apps](https://chargedstudio.co.uk/services/software): Bespoke booking systems, customer portals, dashboards and workflow automation.
- [SEO & Getting Found](https://chargedstudio.co.uk/services/seo): Local SEO, Google Business Profile, Core Web Vitals, and AEO (Answer Engine Optimisation).
- [Branding & Creative](https://chargedstudio.co.uk/services/branding): Logo, visual identity and brand guidelines that match the websites we build.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://chargedstudio.co.uk/)
- [Services overview](https://chargedstudio.co.uk/services)
- [Free website audit](https://chargedstudio.co.uk/audit): Request a free, no-obligation review of your current site.
- [Start a project](https://chargedstudio.co.uk/start-a-project): Tell us about your project and get a reply within one working day.
- [About](https://chargedstudio.co.uk/about): Founder-led studio. Charlie Norona is a qualified project manager (APM PMQ) as well as a designer.
- [Case study: Devon Nurseries](https://chargedstudio.co.uk/devon-nurseries)
- [Blog](https://chargedstudio.co.uk/blog)

## Who it's for
Growing local service businesses in Exeter, Devon and the South West of England that want a website which earns its keep — fast, easy to find, and built to bring in more enquiries.

## Facts
- Location: Exeter, Devon, United Kingdom. Serves Devon and the South West.
- Founder: Charlie Norona, Founder & Creative Director (APM PMQ qualified).
- Rating: 5.0 from 16 Google reviews.
- Contact: hello@chargedstudio.co.uk
